footer.description: The best automotive aesthetics center. Washing, polishing and detailing with premium quality.
about.hero.title: Passion for Precision and Speed.
about.hero.desc: The name Doctor 46 is born from a passion for excellence. Inspired by the legendary Italian rider Valentino Rossi, known worldwide as "The Doctor".
about.inspiration.title: More than a number.
about.inspiration.p1: The number 46 represents consistency, performance, and absolute dedication to detail.
about.inspiration.p2: Just as Rossi revolutionized motorcycling with technique, intelligence, and a unique personality, Doctor 46 Car Wash was created with the same goal: to elevate automotive care to a professional level.
about.why.title: Why "Doctor"?
about.why.desc: In the racing world, "The Doctor" symbolizes someone who works with clinical precision, calm under pressure, and total mastery of their art. At our car wash, we treat every vehicle the same way.
about.steps.diagnosis.title: Diagnosis
about.steps.diagnosis.desc: Detailed analysis of the vehicle status before any intervention.
about.steps.treatment.title: Treatment
about.steps.treatment.desc: Application of specialized techniques and products for each surface.
about.steps.attention.title: Attention
about.steps.attention.desc: Extreme focus on the details that make a difference in the final result.
about.steps.result.title: Result
about.steps.result.desc: An impeccable finish that restores the original shine.
about.quote: "Every car enters as a customer. Leaves as a masterpiece."
about.meaning.title: The Meaning of 46
about.meaning.desc: The number 46 has become a global icon representing identity, passion, and constancy. For us, it symbolizes:
about.meaning.footer: It's not just a car wash — it's an experience.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.desc: To transform every wash into a premium service, combining:
about.mission.footer: Because we believe every car deserves champion treatment.
process.hero.title: Our Process
process.hero.desc: Discover how we turn car washing into an art and learn about our exclusive supply and import services.
process.wash.title: How Our Washing Works
process.wash.desc: We don't use rollers or aggressive products. Our method is 100% manual, safe, and focused on preserving your vehicle's paint and materials.
process.steps.1.title: Pre-Wash and Decontamination
process.steps.1.desc: Application of active foam (Snow Foam) to soften dirt without friction, followed by chemical decontamination of the wheels.
process.steps.2.title: Safe Manual Washing
process.steps.2.desc: We use the two-bucket method with premium microfiber gloves to avoid micro-scratches (swirls) on the paint.
process.steps.3.title: Drying and Finishing
process.steps.3.desc: Drying with super-absorbent microfiber towels and compressed air in crevices. Quick wax application for extra shine.
process.advantages.title: Advantages of Our Service
process.advantages.desc: Choosing Doctor 46 ensures that your investment is treated with the respect it deserves.
process.adv.1.title: Value Preservation
process.adv.1.desc: Well-maintained paint and a clean interior keep the vehicle's commercial value high.
process.adv.2.title: Premium Products
process.adv.2.desc: We only use internationally renowned brands, with neutral pH and safe for all materials.
process.adv.3.title: Specialized Technicians
process.adv.3.desc: Our team receives continuous training in the best automotive detailing practices.
process.adv.4.title: Long-lasting Protection
process.adv.4.desc: Our treatments create barriers against UV rays, acid rain, and contamination.
process.extra.title: Much More Than A Wash
process.extra.desc: Doctor 46 is your complete automotive partner. Beyond aesthetics, we offer supply and import solutions to ensure you never lack anything.
process.import.parts.title: Parts Import
process.import.parts.desc: Need a specific part you can't find in the local market? We handle the import of original and aftermarket parts for all brands, quickly and safely.
process.import.products.title: Detailing Products
process.import.products.desc: We provide the same premium products we use in our center. From waxes, shampoos, and sealants to microfiber accessories to care for your car at home.
process.import.cars.title: Vehicle Import
process.import.cars.desc: Looking for your dream car? We handle the entire vehicle import process, new or used, from searching abroad to legalization and turnkey delivery.
services.title: Our Services
services.desc: We treat cars, motorcycles, trucks, machines, and fleets with the right care for every need. Choose the ideal service and book your time in a few clicks.
contact.hero.title: Contact Us
contact.hero.desc: We are here to answer all your questions and schedule the best treatment for your vehicle.
contact.info.title: Contact Information
contact.info.desc: Visit us or contact us through our official channels. Our team is ready to help you.
contact.form.title: Send us a Message
contact.form.name: Full Name
contact.form.subject: Subject
booking.contact.name: Full name
booking.success.title: Booking Confirmed!
booking.success.desc: Thank you, {name}. Your request for {service} has been successfully saved in the portal.
service.s1.name: Simple Wash
service.s1.desc: Exterior wash, wheel cleaning and basic vacuuming for everyday use.
service.s2.name: Complete Wash
service.s2.desc: Interior and exterior wash, with complete vacuuming, detailed glass cleaning and a beautiful finish.
service.s9.name: Complete Wash + Chassis
service.s9.desc: The same package as the complete wash, now with additional chassis cleaning to remove mud, dust and dirt accumulated on the bottom of the vehicle.
service.s11.name: Engine Wash
service.s11.desc: Wash dedicated only to the engine, with care for sensitive parts and removal of dust, light oil and accumulated dirt.
service.s3.name: Super Complete Wash
service.s3.desc: Complete service for those who want a deeper treatment, with well-cared engine, chassis and interior.
service.s4.name: Seat Cleaning
service.s4.desc: Deep cleaning of seats, roof and carpets to remove stains, dust and bad smells.
service.s5.name: Paint Polishing
service.s5.desc: Polishing to restore intense shine and make the paint look better.
service.s10.name: Business Package
service.s10.desc: Special package for public, private companies, societies and fleets with recurring service and commercial conditions.
service.s6.name: Motorcycle Wash
service.s6.desc: Careful wash for motorcycles, with attention to fairings, chain, wheels and sensitive parts.
service.s7.name: Truck Wash
service.s7.desc: Strong wash of the cabin and chassis to remove mud, dust and grease from the day's work.
service.s8.name: Machine Wash
service.s8.desc: Technical cleaning for tractors and other machines, with focus on mud, oil and heavy dirt.
